tier_rationale: This updates git branch policy guidance and records cleanup of already-merged local branches. It does not modify runtime product code.
request_summary: Clean up merged task branches and strengthen the guide so branch deletion is not missed after merge and push.
goal: Delete local branches that have already been merged into main and update the branch policy completion checklist to require merged branch cleanup evidence.

positive: Delete only branches confirmed as merged into main.
Update git branch policy with a completion checklist item for branch cleanup.
negative: Do not modify runtime product code.
Do not include secrets, tokens, passwords, or PII.

success_criteria: Merged local branches fix/encoding-repair, task/TASK-20260427-084, and task/TASK-20260427-085 are deleted.
docs/operations/git-branch-policy.md explicitly requires post-merge local branch cleanup verification.
CURRENT_STATE.md reflects the guide version update and completed task.
git branch --list shows no stale merged task branches from TASK-20260427-084 or TASK-20260427-085.

context.relevant_history: After TASK-20260427-083 through TASK-20260427-085, merged local branches remained in the repository even though git-branch-policy.md already says task branches should be deleted after merge.
